meaning: n.中途,半路adj.中途的adv.在中途
examples: Our trip takes Midway as a starting point.
He crashed midway through the race.
The goal was scored midway through the first half.
The Knicks forced a fourth foul on Hibbert midway through the quarter, while up five points.
Boston quickly caught up, paring back some of Toronto's momentum midway into the period.
